import core.sys
import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn advance(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn name(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

fn count_next(_ s: String) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        if tok == "next"
          count = count + 1
        end
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        start = i
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    if tok == "next"
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  count
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let k = count_next(input)
mut state = Color.Red
mut j = 0
while j < k
  state = advance(state)
  j = j + 1
end
println(name(state))
